title: QFT Non-Perturbative: Instantons, Confinement & Dualities

dilute_gas.note: exp(-8π²/g²) = EML-1: non-perturbative, but EML-1 not EML-∞

instanton_physics.key_insight: Instanton amplitude exp(-8π²/g²) = EML-1: non-perturbative physics is EML-1, not EML-∞

qcd_confinement.key_insight: α_s(Q) = EML-2 (log running); Wilson loop = EML-1 (area law); confinement = EML-∞

mirror_symmetry_K3.depth_reduction: Mirror symmetry: EML-∞ (quantum geometry) → EML-0 (Hodge numbers)

montonen_olive.note: Montonen-Olive = another EML ∞→2 depth reduction (like AdS/CFT)

field_theory_dualities.key_insight: Dualities = EML-0 maps (inversion, swap) that achieve EML-∞→2 depth reductions

eml_depth_summary.EML-0: String tension σ~Λ², Euler characteristic χ, duality maps (g→1/g)
eml_depth_summary.EML-1: Instanton amplitude exp(-8π²/g²), Wilson loop exp(-σRT)
eml_depth_summary.EML-2: Running coupling α_s(Q)=EML-2 (log Q/Λ), electric particles
eml_depth_summary.EML-\u221e: Confinement, quark-gluon plasma transition, magnetic monopoles (before duality)

key_theorem: The EML Non-Perturbative Depth Theorem: Non-perturbative effects (instantons) are EML-1 — exp(-1/g²) is an EML-1 function. This reveals that the non-perturbative sector is accessible at EML-1, not EML-∞, despite being invisible to perturbation theory. Confinement itself is EML-∞ (the phenomenon cannot be described EML-finitely). Dualities (S, T, mirror, Montonen-Olive) are EML-0 maps that achieve EML-∞→2 reductions — the same class as AdS/CFT and Shor's algorithm.
rabbit_hole_log: Instanton exp(-8π²/g²) = EML-1: same class as BCS gap, Kondo T_K!
Wilson area law exp(-σRT) = EML-1: confinement signal is EML-1, confinement itself = EML-∞
Running coupling α_s = EML-2: logarithm of scale (asymptotic freedom)
S-duality g→1/g = EML-0 map: achieves EML-∞→EML-2 reduction
Mirror symmetry χ→-χ = EML-0 map: same! All dualities are EML-0
AdS/CFT, Shor, S-duality, L=EML-2: a universal pattern of ∞→finite reductions

connections.S143_cosmology_holography: AdS/CFT = EML-∞→2; S-duality here = EML-∞→2: same depth reduction class
connections.S148_materials_kondo: Instanton exp(-8π²/g²) ≡ Kondo T_K exp(-1/JN₀): same EML-1 structure
connections.S135_crypto_shor: Shor QFT period-finding = EML-3; duality reductions here = EML-0 maps
